title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 7 - Moving (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introductory computer science course taught by David J. Malan. Chapter 7 covers moving, with the lecture available as a live unedited video on YouTube. The course is offered through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: Chapter 7 of CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu covers the topic of moving, presented as a live, unedited lecture on YouTube. CS50 is Harvard University's introductory computer science course associated with David J. Malan, and the broader course touches on artificial intelligence fundamentals and deep learning. The course is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
